INDEX_DESCRIPTION: Select a module below to save drills, build workouts, define goals, and track progress.

drills.title: Boxing Drills
drills.description: Save your favorite instructional drills and techniques across web sites.

videos.title: Boxing Videos
videos.description: Save your favorite instructional videos and techniques across web sites.

workouts.title: Manage Workouts
workouts.description: Put together combinations of drills to have ready to go workouts.

progress.title: Track Progress
progress.description: Reflect on your workouts, track your progress, and areas to improve to meet your goals

goals.title: Goals
goals.description: Define your goals to remain focused.
